debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
f : U → V
⊢ onto f ↔ range f = Univ V

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  constructor
  · -- Prove the forward direction: if f is onto, then range f = Univ V
    intro h
    apply Set.ext
    intro y
    simp only [Set.mem_univ, Set.mem_range, exists_prop]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [onto]) <;>
    (try tauto) <;>
    (try aesop)
  · -- Prove the reverse direction: if range f = Univ V, then f is onto
    intro h
    rw [Set.ext_iff] at h
    simp only [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_univ, true_and] at h ⊢
    intro y
    have h₁ := h y
    simp at h₁
    tauto
